entries.sentence: These shoes are too small.
entries.chinese: these = 这些；这些鞋太小了。

entries.sentence: They are waiting outside.
entries.chinese: they = 他们；他们正在外面等候。

entries.sentence: This book belongs to Ella.
entries.chinese: this = 这本；这本书是埃拉的。

entries.sentence: Those mountains are beautiful.
entries.chinese: those = 那些；那些山很美。

entries.sentence: Though it was cold, we went swimming.
entries.chinese: though = 虽然；虽然天气很冷，我们还是去游泳了。

entries.sentence: Wait here till I come back.
entries.chinese: till = 直到；在这里等到我回来。

entries.sentence: We walked to the station.
entries.chinese: to = 到；我们步行到了车站。

entries.sentence: We cooked dinner together.
entries.chinese: together = 一起；我们一起做了晚饭。

entries.sentence: We are seeing a film tonight.
entries.chinese: tonight = 今晚；我们今晚要去看电影。

entries.sentence: This bag is too heavy.
entries.chinese: too = 太；这个包太重了。

entries.sentence: I totally agree with you.
entries.chinese: totally = 完全；我完全同意你的看法。

entries.sentence: She walked toward the entrance.
entries.chinese: toward = 朝向；她朝入口走去。

entries.sentence: I have visited Rome twice.
entries.chinese: twice = 两次；我去过罗马两次。

entries.sentence: The journey typically takes an hour.
entries.chinese: typically = 通常；这段旅程通常需要一个小时。

entries.sentence: Your shoes are under the bed.
entries.chinese: under = 在...下面；你的鞋在床下面。

entries.sentence: The cat is hiding underneath the table.
entries.chinese: underneath = 在...下面；猫正躲在桌子下面。

entries.sentence: Unfortunately, the museum was closed.
entries.chinese: unfortunately = 不幸的是；不幸的是，博物馆关门了。

entries.sentence: You cannot enter unless you have a ticket.
entries.chinese: unless = 除非；除非你有票，否则不能进入。

entries.sentence: The library is open until eight.
entries.chinese: until = 直到；图书馆开放到八点。

entries.sentence: It is unusual to see snow here in April.
entries.chinese: unusual = 不寻常的；四月在这里看到雪并不寻常。

entries.sentence: She ran up the stairs.
entries.chinese: up = 向上；她跑上了楼梯。

entries.sentence: The book was lying upon the table.
entries.chinese: upon = 在...上；书放在桌子上。

entries.sentence: This lift can carry up to eight people.
entries.chinese: up to = 最多；这部电梯最多可载八人。

entries.sentence: This map is not up to date.
entries.chinese: up to date = 最新的；这张地图不是最新的。

entries.sentence: The hospital urgently needs more nurses.
entries.chinese: urgently = 迫切地；这家医院迫切需要更多护士。

entries.sentence: Please send us the details.
entries.chinese: us = 我们；请把详细信息发给我们。

entries.sentence: We used to live near the sea.
entries.chinese: used to = 过去常常；我们过去住在海边。

entries.sentence: The final is Brazil versus Spain.
entries.chinese: versus = 对阵；决赛由巴西对阵西班牙。

entries.sentence: This book is very useful.
entries.chinese: very = 非常；这本书非常有用。

entries.sentence: Please send the document via email.
entries.chinese: via = 通过；请通过电子邮件发送文件。

entries.sentence: We live near the park.
entries.chinese: we = 我们；我们住在公园附近。

entries.sentence: Well done, you passed the exam!
entries.chinese: well done = 做得好；做得好，你通过考试了！

entries.sentence: This jacket is well made and should last for years.
entries.chinese: well made = 做工精良；这件夹克做工精良，应该能穿很多年。

entries.sentence: What are you looking for?
entries.chinese: what = 什么；你在找什么？

entries.sentence: Choose whatever you like.
entries.chinese: whatever = 无论什么；选择任何你喜欢的东西。

entries.sentence: When does the shop close?
entries.chinese: when = 什么时候；商店什么时候关门？

entries.sentence: Call me whenever you need help.
entries.chinese: whenever = 无论何时；无论何时需要帮助都可以给我打电话。

entries.sentence: Where did you buy that coat?
entries.chinese: where = 在哪里；你在哪里买的那件外套？

entries.sentence: You can sit wherever you like.
entries.chinese: wherever = 无论哪里；你喜欢坐哪里都可以。

entries.sentence: I do not know whether he will come.
entries.chinese: whether = 是否；我不知道他是否会来。

entries.sentence: Which bus goes to the airport?
entries.chinese: which = 哪一辆；哪一辆公交车去机场？

entries.sentence: Who is your English teacher?
entries.chinese: who = 谁；谁是你的英语老师？

entries.sentence: We spent the whole day at the beach.
entries.chinese: whole = 整个；我们在海滩度过了整整一天。

entries.sentence: Whose phone is this?
entries.chinese: whose = 谁的；这是谁的手机？

entries.sentence: Why are you laughing?
entries.chinese: why = 为什么；你为什么笑？

entries.sentence: I will call you tomorrow.
entries.chinese: will = 将会；我明天会给你打电话。

entries.sentence: I went to the cinema with my friends.
entries.chinese: with = 和...一起；我和朋友们一起去了电影院。

entries.sentence: Please reply within five days.
entries.chinese: within = 在...以内；请在五天内回复。

entries.sentence: He left without saying goodbye.
entries.chinese: without = 没有；他没有告别就离开了。

entries.sentence: Would you like a cup of tea?
entries.chinese: would = 愿意；你想喝杯茶吗？
